race.comment: SHARE THE PENNIES (13) spiked her figures missing by just 0.5 lengths over this distance at Ballarat as a $3F. Has been freshened and is likely to get through the ground.  ANGEL'S GATHERING (1) ran a much better race when doing his best work late to finish a close third over 1350m at Donald. The extra trip will suit and he will keep improving for a top stable. THUNDERBOLT WAY (9) has the inside barrier and more up his sleeve. A quick improver with genuine claims. BAROSSA VALLEY (2) has the blinkers on for the first time and is sure to show more over the longer journey. It's hard to risk the premier stable.
